aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**
   - **Issue #165** by [johnx1971](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)
   - Existing Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (Driver: `climate_sensor`)

2. **TS0003 (_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp)**
   - **Issue #170** by [Ssssneak](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)
   - Existing Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp` (Driver: `switch_3gang`)

3. **Motion Sensor**
   - **Issue #164** by [late4marshmellow](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/164)
   - Existing Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (Driver: `motion_sensor`)

## New Fingerprints Found
- **From zigbee2mqtt** (Issue #182 by [github-actions](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/182)):
  - `_TZ3000_dojqjapa`
  - `_TZ3000_icoxotza`
  - `_TZ3000_t7ugva7q`
  - `_TZ3000_uyrhiafs`
  - `_TZ3002_vsom92pp`
  - `_TZ3008_reatplte`
  - `_TZ3210_imaccztn`
  - `_TZ3210_vbfp8eyv`
  - `_TZ3210_zifx0xoj`
  - `_TZB210_qzsxaqqe`
  - `_TZE200_hbnfokum`
  - `_TZE200_w0ap83qu`
  - `_TZE204_cduqh1l0`
  - `_TZE204_ouy7vpm1`
  - `_TZE284_3regm3h6`
  - `_TZE284_4vbj3fxh`
  - `_TZE284_4vobcgd3`
  - `_TZE284_bw4ayyeh`
  - `_TZE284_mul9abs3`
  - `_TZE284_mvtclclq`
  - `_TZE284_nbv4tdaz`
  - `_TZE284_tgrzpqf4`

## Existing Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
1. **BSEED 2 Button Wall Switch**
   - **Issue #1337** by [pjmpessers](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)
   - Existing Fingerprints:
     - `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (Driver: `switch_2gang`)
     - `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (Drivers: `switch_3gang`, `switch_4gang`)

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices**
   - **PR #180** by [Robsta86](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180) (Closed, not merged)
   - Fingerprints: `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`

2. **Added TS110E Driver**
   - **PR #1350** by [PiTRiS87](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) (Open)
   - Fingerprints: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`

3. **Support for Tuya PIR Sensor TS0202**
   - **PR #1166** by [chernals](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166) (Closed, not merged)
   - Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`

4. **Added 3 New Devices**
   - **PR #1253** by [Peter-Celica](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) (Open)
   - Fingerprints: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`

5. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1219** by [Melectro1](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219) (Open)
   - Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`

6. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1218** by [Melectro1](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218) (Open)
   - Fingerprint: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`

7. **Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json**
   - **PR #1195** by [YuriEstevan](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195) (Open)
   - Fingerprint: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`

This summary captures the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing fingerprints, and significant pull requests for integration.
